fixed_context.quantum_efficiency_status: experimentally plausible dissertation screening value; not measured
fixed_context.faraday_calibration_status: Version 1 phenomenological placeholder; absolute Faraday SNR is uncalibrated

noise_realisation.interpretation: one fixed representative draw per mode and selected fluence; random draws illustrate camera appearance and do not estimate the analytic SNR

canonical_checks.snr_interpretation: analytic central-3x3 SNR with QE=0.60 and sigma_r=3 e- rms; the displayed random frames do not determine these values

scope.camera_noise: Poisson variance plus the provisional dissertation screening value sigma_r=3 e- rms per pixel and readout
scope.state: same undepleted reference condensate at every fluence
scope.prediction_status: screening calculation within the Version 1 forward model, not guaranteed experimental performance
